creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: martymac
Date: Tue Sep 11 06:17:03 2012
New Revision: 304082
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304082

Log:
  - Add MUSIC and NLS options
  - Add a pixmap
  
  PR:		ports/171256
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch>

Modified:
  head/games/trackballs/Makefile
  head/games/trackballs/distinfo
  head/games/trackballs/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/trackballs/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/trackballs/Makefile	Tue Sep 11 06:14:26 2012	(r304081)
+++ head/games/trackballs/Makefile	Tue Sep 11 06:17:03 2012	(r304082)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	trackballs
 PORTVERSION=	1.1.4
-PORTREVISION=	14
+PORTREVISION=	15
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	SF
+MASTER_SITES=	SF \
+		SF/${PORTNAME}/music/1.4/:music
+DISTFILES=	${PORTNAME}-${DISTVERSION}${EXTRACT_SUFX} \
+		${PORTNAME}-music-1.4.tar.bz2:music
 
 MAINTAINER=	martymac@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	SDL-based Marble Madness clone
@@ -34,11 +37,36 @@ MANCOMPRESSED=	no
 CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib -lintl
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	NLS MUSIC
+MUSIC_DESC=	Install additional music
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	NLS MUSIC
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS}
+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-nls
+PLIST_SUB+=	NLS=""
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
+PLIST_SUB+=	NLS="@comment "
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMUSIC}
+PLIST_SUB+=	MUSIC=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=	MUSIC="@comment "
+.endif
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|install -D|$$(INSTALL)|' \
 		${WRKSRC}/share/Makefile.in
 
 post-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMUSIC}
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/trackballs-music/*.ogg ${DATADIR}/music/
+.endif
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/share/icons/${PORTNAME}-48x48.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png
 	-@update-desktop-database
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================

 SIZE (trackballs-1.1.4.tar.gz) = 7229541

+SIZE (trackballs-music-1.4.tar.bz2) = 18825033

 %%DATADIR%%/mapeditor.html
 %%DATADIR%%/scriptingLanguage.html
+%%MUSIC%%%%DATADIR%%/music/eurovision.ogg
